import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def process_batch(items):
    for item in items:
        logger.debug(f"Processing item {item['id']} with payload {item['payload']}")
        result = transform(item)
        logger.info(f"Completed item {item['id']} in {result['elapsed']:.3f}s")

def transform(item):
    return {"id": item["id"], "elapsed": 0.01}
